---
title: "Publications"
title-meta: "Publications | Pierpaolo Vendittelli"
description: "Publications by Pierpaolo Vendittelli in digital pathology, computational pathology, pancreatic cancer AI, and multimodal clinical AI."
toc: false
---

<div id="publications-root"></div>

```{=html}
<script type="module" src="assets/js/pages/publications.js"></script>
```
